title: RapidMeta Oncology | Neoadjuvant Immunotherapy + Chemo in Resectable NSCLC v1.0
hero_h2: Neoadjuvant Immune Checkpoint Inhibitor + Chemotherapy in Resectable Non-Small-Cell Lung Cancer

pico.pop: Adults with resectable non-small-cell lung cancer (CheckMate-816: stage IB-IIIA; KEYNOTE-671 / AEGEAN: stage II-IIIB), staged by AJCC 7th/8th edition, ECOG 0-1
pico.int: Neoadjuvant programmed-death-1/PD-L1 immune checkpoint inhibitor + platinum-doublet chemotherapy: nivolumab 360 mg Q3W (CheckMate-816), pembrolizumab 200 mg Q3W (KEYNOTE-671), or durvalumab 1500 mg Q3W (AEGEAN); KEYNOTE-671 and AEGEAN add adjuvant ICI for 12-13 cycles after surgery
pico.comp: Neoadjuvant platinum-doublet chemotherapy alone (CheckMate-816) or chemotherapy + adjuvant placebo (KEYNOTE-671, AEGEAN)
pico.out: Event-free survival (EFS; primary in all three trials, defined as time from randomization to disease progression precluding curative-intent surgery, recurrence after surgery, or death; HR vs control)
pico.subgroup: Stage (II vs III), histology (squamous vs non-squamous), PD-L1 expression (TPS <1% / 1-49% / >=50%), smoking status, EGFR / ALK status, sex

real_data_entries.name: CheckMate-816
real_data_entries.group: Neoadjuvant nivolumab + platinum-doublet chemotherapy x3 cycles vs neoadjuvant chemotherapy alone, resectable stage IB-IIIA NSCLC; co-primary EFS + pCR
real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Forde PM et al. NEJM 2022;386:1973-1985 (CheckMate-816 nivolumab + chemo neoadjuvant).

real_data_entries.name: KEYNOTE-671
real_data_entries.group: Neoadjuvant pembrolizumab + chemo x4 cycles + adjuvant pembrolizumab x13 cycles vs neoadjuvant chemo + adjuvant placebo; resectable stage II-IIIB NSCLC; co-primary EFS + OS
real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Wakelee H et al. NEJM 2023;389:491-503 (KEYNOTE-671 pembrolizumab perioperative).

real_data_entries.name: AEGEAN
real_data_entries.group: Neoadjuvant durvalumab + chemo x4 cycles + adjuvant durvalumab x12 cycles vs neoadjuvant chemo + adjuvant placebo; resectable stage II-IIIB NSCLC; primary EFS + pCR
real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Heymach JV et al. NEJM 2023;389:1672-1684 (AEGEAN durvalumab perioperative).
